title: Tapinanthus kisaguka
taxonomy: Tapinanthus kisaguka is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. It belongs to the genus Tapinanthus, which is a group of mistletoe plants native to Africa. Tapinanthus kisaguka is classified under the subfamily Loranthoideae, which contains many other species of mistletoe. The classification of this plant is further divided into the family Loranthaceae, order Santalales, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Tapinanthus kisaguka and other similar species.

It is reported to possess antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various infections.
